message:
fix(rpc): skip auto-import for shutdown and read-only diagnostic ops (bd-15)

The auto-import staleness check was only skipped for ping/health/metrics/export
but still ran for shutdown, getMutations, getMoleculeProgress, gate ops, and
other diagnostic operations. Triggering auto-import during shutdown is
counterproductive, and read-only diagnostic ops do not need fresh data imports.

Extracted a skipAutoImport() helper to cleanly categorize which operations
skip the check, replacing the growing chain of != comparisons.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/topaz
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
